description:
Configure the 'Workplace Safety' (SAFE101) course to enforce strict completion rules. Set the 'Grade to pass' for the 'Safety Certification Exam' quiz to 80.00 and update its activity completion settings to require both a grade and a passing mark. Configure the 'Employee Handbook' page to be marked complete when viewed. Set the course completion requirements to require the completion of both the 'Employee Handbook' and the 'Safety Certification Exam' using the 'ALL' aggregation condition.

Login: admin / Admin1234!
